name: Solopreneur
description: Startup advisor skill powered by Stanford CS183B / Y Combinator's 'How to Start a Startup' course — 20 lectures from world-class founders and investors

skills.name: solopreneur
skills.description: Startup advisor skill powered by Stanford CS183B / Y Combinator's 'How to Start a Startup' course. 20 lectures, 1,000+ minutes of wisdom from Sam Altman, Paul Graham, Peter Thiel, Marc Andreessen, Reid Hoffman, and more. Covers ideas, products, growth, fundraising, hiring, culture, sales, management, and operations.

user.claude: npx skills add zhimin-z/solopreneur --skill solopreneur -a claude
user.droid: npx skills add zhimin-z/solopreneur --skill solopreneur -a droid
user.opencode: npx skills add zhimin-z/solopreneur --skill solopreneur -a opencode
user.codex: npx skills add zhimin-z/solopreneur --skill solopreneur -a codex
